scenarios.title: Sales Pipeline Forecasting
scenarios.description: Stage-weighted probability x deal value x time-decay forecasting with commit vs best-case vs pipeline breakdown

scenarios.title: Win/Loss Attribution Analysis
scenarios.description: Binary classification with SHAP explanations on deal outcomes using deal size, cycle length, competitor presence

scenarios.title: Lead Scoring Model
scenarios.description: Logistic regression or XGBoost with behavioural and firmographic features producing calibrated conversion probability

scenarios.title: Price Elasticity Modelling
scenarios.description: Log-log OLS regression for price elasticity coefficients with Bayesian uncertainty quantification

scenarios.title: Margin Waterfall Analysis
scenarios.description: Revenue to EBITDA decomposition identifying which discount types destroy the most margin

scenarios.title: Promotional Effectiveness
scenarios.description: Difference-in-differences causal lift measurement separating base vs incremental volume

scenarios.title: Multi-Touch Campaign Attribution
scenarios.description: Multi-touch attribution modelling across channels with customer acquisition cost analysis

scenarios.title: Customer Lifetime Value Segmentation
scenarios.description: LTV modelling with cohort analysis and segmentation for targeted marketing spend allocation

scenarios.title: Funnel Conversion Optimisation
scenarios.description: Conversion funnel analysis identifying drop-off points and optimisation opportunities per stage

scenarios.title: Demand Forecasting Pipeline
scenarios.description: Time series forecasting with AutoARIMA/NHITS producing P10/P50/P90 probabilistic intervals for safety stock

scenarios.title: Inventory Optimisation
scenarios.description: Reorder point, safety stock, and EOQ calculation with lead time variability and holding cost analysis

scenarios.title: Supplier Risk Assessment
scenarios.description: Supplier reliability scoring based on delivery performance, quality defects, and lead time consistency

scenarios.title: Customer Churn Prediction
scenarios.description: Survival analysis or classification for churn prediction with feature importance and intervention recommendations

scenarios.title: NPS Driver Analysis
scenarios.description: Identify key drivers of Net Promoter Score using regression and SHAP to prioritise improvement areas

scenarios.title: Customer Health Scoring
scenarios.description: Composite health score from product usage, support tickets, and engagement metrics for proactive retention

scenarios.title: Cash Flow Forecasting
scenarios.description: VAR or ARIMA-based multi-variate cash flow forecasting with change point detection

scenarios.title: Budget vs Actuals Variance Analysis
scenarios.description: Systematic variance decomposition by segment and cost centre with root cause identification

scenarios.title: Profitability by Segment
scenarios.description: Multi-dimensional profitability analysis by segment, SKU, and channel with cost allocation

scenarios.title: Delivery Route Optimisation
scenarios.description: Vehicle routing problem using OR-Tools to minimise total distance and time with capacity constraints

scenarios.title: SLA Adherence Analysis
scenarios.description: SLA compliance analysis identifying patterns in breaches by time, region, and service type

scenarios.title: Equipment Maintenance Prediction
scenarios.description: Predictive maintenance using sensor data to forecast failure probability and optimal maintenance windows

scenarios.title: Employee Attrition Risk Model
scenarios.description: Predict voluntary attrition using tenure, compensation, engagement, and performance data with intervention recommendations

scenarios.title: Hiring Funnel Analysis
scenarios.description: Conversion rate analysis across hiring stages with time-to-hire metrics and source effectiveness

scenarios.title: Compensation Benchmarking
scenarios.description: Market compensation analysis by role, level, and location with equity and retention risk scoring

scenarios.title: Feature Adoption Analysis
scenarios.description: Track feature adoption curves, identify power users vs dormant features, and measure release impact

scenarios.title: A/B Test Evaluation
scenarios.description: Statistical evaluation of A/B tests with power analysis, significance testing, and practical significance assessment

scenarios.title: Retention Curve Analysis
scenarios.description: Cohort-based retention analysis with curve fitting to predict long-term retention and identify drop-off patterns

AcmeRetail.description: 2,000 SKUs, 36-month history, 4 competitor price points per SKU

AcmeManufacturing.description: Multi-site manufacturer with 500 suppliers and 3,000 SKUs

AcmeLogistics.description: Fleet of 50 vehicles, 200 daily deliveries, 3 warehouses
